title: orthocarpus erianthus var. micranthus
intro: Orthocarpus erianthus var. micranthus, also known as the small-flowered owl's-clover, is a flowering plant that belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as digestive problems. The health benefits of Orthocarpus erianthus var. micranthus include its ability to relieve congestion, reduce inflammation, and soothe digestive issues, making it a valuable herb for promoting overall well-being. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
